**Is your feature request related to a current app limitation?**
A clear description of what the architectural limitation or restriction currently is.

**Describe the solution you'd like:**
A clear description of what visual framework, API calculation, or script optimization you want to evolve.

**Additional Context:**
Add any mockups, target layout wireframes, or reference code logic here.
